# CheckAPI — API Health Monitor

CheckAPI is a free API and uptime monitoring platform with zero commercial restrictions.
It detects both hard failures (connection errors, wrong status codes) and silent failures
(HTTP 200 responses with broken or unexpected body content).

## What makes CheckAPI different

- Silent Failure Detection: monitors response body using regex, JSON Path assertions, and keyword matching
- Free plan includes all 5 alert channels (Email, Slack, Telegram, Discord, Webhook)
- No commercial-use restrictions on any plan
- JSON Path assertions (up to 10 per monitor) with AND/OR logic
- Heartbeat / cron job monitoring
- Public status pages (shareable, no login required)
- SSL certificate expiry alerts (14 days notice)
- Maintenance windows (suppress alerts during planned downtime)
- Team collaboration (Pro and Business plans)

## Plans

- Free: 10 monitors, 5-minute interval, 30-day history, all alert channels
- Starter ($5/mo): 20 monitors, 1-minute interval
- Pro ($15/mo): 100 monitors, 30-second interval, 90-day history, team (5 members)
- Business ($49/mo): Unlimited monitors, 10-second interval, 1-year history, unlimited team, API access

Annual billing saves 20%.

- Homepage: https://checkapi.io
